extra.reason: Implemented full-screen overlay rework: Counter and Action overlays now fill viewport (rotated 180 for top-row players); new CommanderDamageOverlay mirrors life tracker layout per receiver, splitting partner commanders horizontally. flutter analyze: no issues.

Implemented round-2 overlay refinements. (1) Receiver's own slot in CommanderDamageOverlay is now fully tappable with a small (you) badge top-left, so stolen-commander damage can be recorded. (2) CounterOverlay reworked to a 2x2 grid that fills the viewport (no scrolling for the 4-item case) with life-counter visual language: titleMedium label, displaySmall white shadowed value, 36px dark circular icon buttons. Fallback GridView path retained for non-4-item callers. flutter analyze: no issues.

Mirrored the CommanderDamageOverlay tile pattern in PlayerCard: each per-commander background image is now wrapped in ClipRect(Stack(fit: StackFit.expand, children: [Opacity(Image(fit: BoxFit.cover))])) inside its Expanded Row slot. Forces the image to fill both width AND height of its half (previously only width was constrained, leaving vertical empty space for partner backgrounds).

Implemented: TurnLogEntry.skipped field, _nextTurn skips eliminated players (bounded loop), _previousTurn auto-pops skipped entries, long-press life total + confirm dialog replaces self-eliminate icon, _hasDismissedElimination removed, GameStatsUtility filters skipped entries. flutter analyze clean.

Wrapped _buildActiveOverlay() in RotatedBox(quarterTurns: 1) when isPortrait in life_tracker_page.dart, so the overlay shares the same logical coordinate space as the rotated player layout. flutter analyze --no-pub clean.
